name: ASUS PRO H610T D4-CSM Thin Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-3200 - M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - LVDS Connector - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Gigabit LAN - 19v DC in - M.2 slot (Key E, type 2230)
shortName: ASUS PRO H610T D4-CSM Thin Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Thin Mini-ITX Intel H610 professional motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 and compact form factor.
